description: This file defines an API client module for interacting with a notes backend service. It includes functions for listing, creating, updating, and deleting notes, as well as bulk operations for tags and notes. The functions handle URL construction, request sending with fetch, and response processing, following REST principles.

methods.name: url(path)
methods.description: Builds a full API URL from a given path, supporting cases with empty base URL for same-origin setups.

methods.name: request(path, options = {})
methods.description: Performs fetch request to the constructed URL with given options, handles response and errors.

methods.name: listNotes({ q, tag, tags, starred, limit = 50, offset = 0 })
methods.description: Fetches a list of notes with optional search query, tags, starred filter, limit, and offset.

methods.name: createNote({ title, content, tags })
methods.description: Creates a new note with specified title, content, and tags.

methods.name: updateNote(id, { title, content, tags, pinned, starred })
methods.description: Updates an existing note by ID with provided fields such as title, content, tags, pinned, starred.

methods.name: setNotePinned(id, pinned)
methods.description: Pins or unpins a note by ID.

methods.name: setNoteStarred(id, starred)
methods.description: Stars or unstars (favorites) a note by ID.

methods.name: bulkDeleteNotes(noteIds)
methods.description: Bulk deletes notes by their IDs.

methods.name: bulkAddTags(noteIds, tags)
methods.description: Adds tags to multiple notes specified by their IDs.

methods.name: bulkRemoveTags(noteIds, tags)
methods.description: Removes tags from multiple notes specified by their IDs.

ctags.name: createNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function createNote({ title, content, tags }) {$/

ctags.name: listNotes
ctags.pattern: /^export async function listNotes({ q, tag, tags, starred, limit = 50, offset = 0 }) {$/
ctags.signature: ({ q, tag, tags, starred, limit = 50, offset = 0 })

ctags.name: updateNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function updateNote(id, { title, content, tags, pinned, starred }) {$/
